'''bashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cadastrally|cadastrally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cadastrally|cadastrally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bashate|bashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bashatesher|bashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashatesherĂ«m|bashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bashatero|bashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bashateshĂ«|bashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashateshĂ«m|bashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibashatero|gokibashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibashateshĂ«|gokibashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashateshĂ«m|gokibashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobashankerom|gobashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobashankeshĂ«|gobashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashankeshĂ«m|gobashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobashankeya|gobashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bashaterom|bashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashatemu|bashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bashateya|bashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibashaterom|gokibashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashatemu|gokibashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibashateya|gokibashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bashashate|bashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bashashatesher|bashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashashatesherĂ«m|bashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bashashatero|bashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bashashateshĂ«|bashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashashateshĂ«m|bashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibashashatero|gokibashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibashashateshĂ«|gokibashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashashateshĂ«m|gokibashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobashashankerom|gobashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobashashankeshĂ«|gobashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobashashankeshĂ«m|gobashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobashashankeya|gobashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bashashaterom|bashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bashashatemu|bashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bashashateya|bashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibashashaterom|gokibashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibashashatemu|gokibashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibashashateya|gokibashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠte|bĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠtesher|bĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠtero|bĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠtero|gokibĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠterom|bĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠtemu|bĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠshĂŠteya|bĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠterom|gokibĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠshĂŠteya|gokibĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafshafte|bafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafshaftesher|bafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafshaftesherĂ«m|bafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafshaftero|bafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafshafteshĂ«|bafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafshafteshĂ«m|bafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafshaftero|gokibafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafshafteshĂ«|gokibafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafshafteshĂ«m|gokibafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafshafnkerom|gobafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafshafnkeshĂ«|gobafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafshafnkeshĂ«m|gobafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafshafnkeya|gobafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafshafterom|bafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafshaftemu|bafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafshafteya|bafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafshafterom|gokibafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafshaftemu|gokibafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafshafteya|gokibafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
